SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.rest

Class SecurityActionResource

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.rest.SecurityActionResource
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/securityaction") public class SecurityActionResource extends Object
REST controller for security actions (admin ISIN changes) and security transfers (user account transfers).

  • Method Details

    • getTree

      @GetMapping("/tree") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SecurityActionTreeData> getTree()

    • createSecurityAction

      @PostMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SecurityAction> createSecurityAction(@RequestBody SecurityAction securityAction)

    • deleteSecurityAction

      @DeleteMapping("/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteSecurityAction(@PathVariable Integer id)

    • applySecurityAction

      @PostMapping("/{id}/apply") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SecurityActionApplication> applySecurityAction(@PathVariable Integer id)

    • reverseSecurityAction

      @PostMapping("/{id}/reverse") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> reverseSecurityAction(@PathVariable Integer id)

    • createTransfer

      @PostMapping("/transfer") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SecurityTransfer> createTransfer(@RequestBody SecurityTransfer securityTransfer)

    • reverseTransfer

      @DeleteMapping("/transfer/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> reverseTransfer(@PathVariable Integer id)
